name: Rift Paw
implicitMods: Inflict Lightning Exposure on Hit, applying -13% to Lightning Resistance

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills, making them repeat when cast. Cannot support Vaal skills, totem skills, channelling skills, triggered skills, instant skills, retaliation skills, blink skills, or skills with a reservation.
explicitMods: Supported Skills Repeat an additional time
Supported Skills have 55% more Cast Speed
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Spell Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies in an area at both ends of the teleport. Deals higher damage to chilled enemies, then removes chill from them. Cannot be supported by Unleash.
explicitMods: This Spell's Cast Time is added to its Cooldown if Triggered
19% more Damage with Hits per 5% Chill Effect on Enemy

socketedItems.name: Hollow Globe
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an Abyssal Socket on an Item or into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.

name: Widowhail
explicitMods: 296% increased bonuses gained from Equipped Quiver
flavourText: "I loosed a volley of arrows into the heart of the man
who slew my beloved. There was no satisfaction, no
healing, no revenge. There was only... emptiness."
- Chieftainess Ahuana of the Ramako Tribe

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 10% increased Elemental Damage
Hits from Supported Skills have 44% chance to treat Enemy Monster Elemental Resistance values as inverted
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "She fled from the prison of her birth, drawn by the breaking
of that great Silence. At that moment, the universe was changed,
and walls that were once impenetrable became brittle.
A fortress became a shell, and she alone escaped."

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports projectile skills, making their projectiles fork into two projectiles the first two times they hit an enemy and don't pierce it.

Projectile when Forking
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Projectile Damage

flavourText: Lioneye earned his moniker by killing
three men with a single arrow.

flavourText: She gazed into the mirror...
and the mirror gazed back.

name: Cinderswallow Urn
explicitMods: Recharges 5 Charges when you Consume an Ignited corpse
30% increased Rarity of Items found during Effect
Enemies Ignited by you during Effect take 10% increased Damage
Recover 3% of Energy Shield when you Kill an Enemy during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: A controlled burn is sometimes necessary for new life.

name: Oriath's End
explicitMods: Enemies you Kill during Effect have a 27% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Damage of a Random Element
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: Ennui prevailed, until inspiration sparked
a mote of flame, kindled by fury
and all in his path were obliterated.

name: Progenesis
explicitMods: When Hit during effect, 25% of Life loss from Damage taken occurs over 4 seconds instead
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: They were bred in a cosmic ocean of raw creation.
Feasting and drinking of the milk of the mother,
they fought to the death for every last drop.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any non-blessing skill with a reservation.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 25% increased Aura effect
Supported Skills Reserve Life instead of Mana
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: You and nearby Allies Regenerate 33 Mana per second

explicitMods: Modifiers to Buff Duration also apply to this Skill's Soul Gain Prevention
Your and nearby allies' Skills Cost no Mana
hybrid.secDescrText: Casts a temporary aura that lets you and your allies cast skills without paying their mana costs.

Supported Skills also count as Blessing Skills
You can only have one Aura on you from your Blessing Skills
Your Non-Blessing Skills which Reserve Mana are Disabled while you have an Aura from a Supported Skill on you
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants bonuses to damage and critical strike chance of spells to you and your allies, and gives a chance to create Consecrated Ground against stronger enemies.
explicitMods: You and nearby Non-Minion Allies have a 10% chance to create Consecrated Ground on Hitting a Rare or Unique Enemy, lasting 8 seconds
You and nearby allies have 40% increased Spell Critical Strike Chance
You and nearby allies deal 16% more Spell Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Vessel of Vinktar
explicitMods: Shocks nearby Enemies during Effect, causing 10% increased Damage taken
You are Shocked during Effect, causing 50% increased Damage taken
Damage Penetrates 6% Lightning Resistance during Effect
20% of Lightning Damage Leeched as Life during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: The great city of storms, washed away by Vinktar's thirst for power.

name: Wine of the Prophet
explicitMods: Grants a random Divination Buff for 20 seconds when Used
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: "To proclaim a vision of the future is to make it so,
for those that have the will, and the way!"
- High Templar Andronicus

name: Atziri's Foible
explicitMods: Items and Gems have 29% reduced Attribute Requirements
flavourText: The world is but a piece of parchment, blank and symmetric.
We label each side: one Good, one Evil; one Black, one White.
The divine truth, however, is that both are one and the same.
-Jaetai, Vaal Advisor

name: Kitava's Thirst
implicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems
+2 to Level of Socketed Curse Gems
explicitMods:
50% chance to Trigger Socketed Spells when you Spend at least 100 Mana on an
Upfront Cost to Use or Trigger a Skill, with a 0.1 second Cooldown
flavourText: Tukohama, Tawhoa and Kitava went to the lake to fish.
Tawhoa weaved a net to catch the fish,
Tukohama built a fire to cook the fish,
and Kitava swallowed the entire lake, fish and all, with a single gulp.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses all targets in an area, causing them to be debilitated when they hit enemies and increasing damage they take while on low life.

Cursed Enemies are Debilitated for 3.00 Seconds when they Hit
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

Projectiles which Hit Cursed Enemies Split towards 2 additional targets

name: Headhunter
explicitMods: 25% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters
When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

Enemies in Area deal 24% less Damage while at maximum Stages
Buff grants 8 to 153 Added Lightning Damage per Stage

socketedItems.secDescrText: Spends a portion of your mana to grant a buff that takes some of the damage from hits for you until depleted. The buff grants added lightning damage based on the amount of mana spent by this skill. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods:
75% of Damage from Hits is taken from Buff before your Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take Damage equal to Mana Spent by this Skill's effect
Buff grants Added Lightning Damage equal to 14% of Mana Spent by this Skill's effect
This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect

socketedItems.secDescrText: Place a Frost Shield that drains your energy shield for one second or until you run out, gaining stages while this drain occurs. The Frost Shield takes some damage from hits in place of you and allies while in its area. Enemies in the area are Chilled. You can only have one Frost Shield active at once.
explicitMods: 20% of Damage dealt to you or Allies in Area with Hits by Enemies in Area is taken from Frost Shield's Life before your Life or Energy Shield
60% of Damage dealt to you or Allies in Area with Hits by Enemies outside Area is taken from Frost Shield's Life before your Life or Energy Shield
You gain +0.4% to Spell Critical Strike Chance per Stage while in Area
Frost Shield has 1000 maximum Life per Stage
Gains 1 Stage every 0.3 seconds while you are losing Energy Shield
You lose 800 Energy Shield per second

And tore out her heart.

flavourText: "It's a rare man that has eyes in the back of his head."
- Kiravi, Vaal Archer

The demon-lord opens a gateway
Unleashing a litany of pain upon the world.
